item.title: ❓Alison Halpern - Department of Agriculture
item.description: Alison Halpern signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Agriculture.

item.title: ❓💵Stephanie Celt - Washington State Department of Commerce
item.description: Stephanie Celt signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Department of Commerce. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Kelsey Hulse - Douglas County Public Utility District
item.description: Kelsey Hulse signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Douglas County Public Utility District. They are a registered lobbyist.
